headline: Sox bats go cold at Fenway while Bruins and Celtics prepare for pivotal Game 3 battles
morning_brew: The Red Sox losing to the Yankees at Fenway Park is always a tough pill to swallow, but a 4-1 final with only five hits is absolutely brutal. Jose Suarez couldn't even make it through five innings, giving up four runs early and putting us in a hole we couldn't climb out of. We are sitting at 9-15 now, dead last in the division, and looking like a team that is completely lost at the plate when the lights are brightest.

Over at the Garden, the intensity is finally showing up. The Bruins are tied 1-1 with the Sabres, and we have a massive Game 3 tonight on home ice. After missing the playoffs last year, this city needs a deep run to make up for it. The Celtics are also knotted up at 1-1 with Philadelphia before heading down there for Game 3 on Friday. These series are where legends are made, and both teams need to find another gear starting right now.

And then there is the Patriots news. The draft is right around the corner and the rumors about a potential trade are flying everywhere. Mike Reiss says they are a team to watch, and after that 14-3 season, we need to make sure we capitalize on our picks. It is a wicked busy week in the Hub, and I am already on my third large Dunks just trying to keep up with the chaos on the Pike and at the parks.

trend_watch.trend: Lasted only 4.2 innings while giving up 4 earned runs in a loss.
trend_watch.dans_take: You cannot give up three runs in the first inning against those guys and expect to win. A short outing like that just kills the bullpen.

trend_watch.trend: Pitched 3.1 innings of scoreless relief with 3 strikeouts.
trend_watch.dans_take: He was the only reason the score stayed respectable. The kid came in and threw strikes when the starter couldn't find the zone.

trend_watch.trend: Went 0-for-3 in the loss to New York.
trend_watch.dans_take: The offense is stuck in the mud right now and we need the big bats to actually make contact if we want to climb out of the basement.

news_digest.headline: Celtics, 76ers tied 1-1 heading into game 3
news_digest.dans_take: Philly is a tough place to play, but the Celtics have the talent to go down there and take back home court advantage.

news_digest.headline: Mike Vrabel to seek counseling, won't be with Patriots for NFL draft Day 3
news_digest.dans_take: Hope everyone is safe as this is a tough situation, so we will let the process play out and see if his absence impacts the later rounds of the draft.

news_digest.headline: Bruins and Sabres meet with series tied 1-1
news_digest.dans_take: The Garden is going to be rocking tonight and the B's better be ready for a physical battle against Buffalo.
